text_jp:
よくぞここまで来た
貴様、…何者だ{END}
text_en:
Well done making it this far.
You… what are you?{END}

text_jp:
は！ハハハハ！これは驚いた
奇遇だな我が輩の名も…ブラック！{END}
text_en:
Ha! Hahahaha! What a surprise.
What a coincidence. My name is… Black!{END}

text_jp:
まさか仮面ライダーにも我が輩と
同じ名を持つ者がいるとは…{END}
text_en:
To think a Kamen Rider would bear
the same name as I do…{END}

text_jp: 貴様がどんな奴かは知らんが{END}
text_en: I do not know what sort of man you are,{END}

text_jp:
この世にブラックの名を持つ者は
１人で十分だ！{END}
text_en:
but this world needs only one
who bears the name Black!{END}
